'''Bolto''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] gunman who was once found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. While there he was hired by a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who owned a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] and paid him 50 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per day for the work.
